nasb.text: Now Jacob loved Rachel, so he said, “I will serve you seven years for your younger daughter Rachel.”

esv.text: Jacob loved Rachel. And he said, “I will serve you seven years for your younger daughter Rachel.”

cnv.text: 雅各愛拉結，所以對拉班說：“我願為你的小女兒拉結服事你七年。”

ccb.text: 雅各爱上了拉结，于是对拉班说：“我愿意为你工作七年，请你把拉结许配给我。”

csbs.text: 雅各爱瑞秋，就说：“我愿意为你的小女儿瑞秋服事你七年。”
